tonight_tidbit.text: MacKenzie Gore was the third overall pick in 2017. The Nats got him in the Soto trade. The fastball is real.

notable_injuries.description: Herz (elbow) will throw to live hitters Friday at the Nationals' spring training facility in Florida, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
Henry (shoulder) will begin a rehab assignment with Triple-A Rochester this weekend, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
Beeter (forearm) is ready to begin a rehab assignment, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
Williams (elbow) began pitching off a mound at the Nationals' spring training complex this weekend, Jessica Camerato of MLB.com reports.
Gray (elbow) has resumed a throwing program, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Nationals transferred Waldichuk (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Thursday.
The Nationals signed Kranick (elbow) to a one-year, $800,000 contract Tuesday and placed him on the 15-day injured list.
